fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the bin creation worksheet template you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the warehouse worksheet template you are creating.

fields.name: Page ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the page that is used to show the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of bin creation will be used with this warehouse worksheet template.

fields.name: Page Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the displayed name of the journal or worksheet that uses the template.
